activities.name: Surfing & Swimming
activities.description: Sri Lanka is one of the best tropical surfing destinations in the world thanks to its warm Indian Ocean waters and consistent waves on both the east and south coasts. Many beaches also offer calm swimming areas and beginner-friendly surf schools.

activities.name: Camping
activities.description: Sri Lanka offers incredible camping experiences surrounded by wildlife, mountains, and forests. Visitors can stay in safari camps near national parks or camp in highland mountain ranges with waterfalls and cloud forests.

activities.name: Diving & Snorkeling
activities.description: Sri Lanka’s coral reefs and clear tropical waters make it a fantastic destination for snorkeling and diving. The island is home to vibrant coral ecosystems, sea turtles, reef sharks, and colorful tropical fish.

activities.name: Mountain & Hill Hiking
activities.description: Sri Lanka’s central highlands provide spectacular hiking trails through tea plantations, cloud forests, waterfalls, and scenic viewpoints. Many mountains also have cultural or spiritual significance.

activities.name: Paragliding Tours
activities.description: With dramatic mountain landscapes and steady hill winds, Sri Lanka offers unique paragliding opportunities over valleys, lakes, and tea estates, giving visitors breathtaking aerial views of the island.

activities.name: Wildlife Safari
activities.description: Sri Lanka is one of the best wildlife safari destinations in Asia, known for its large elephant populations and one of the highest leopard densities in the world. National parks provide jeep safaris through forests, grasslands, and lagoons.

activities.name: Whale Watching
activities.description: Sri Lanka is one of the few places in the world where visitors can see blue whales close to shore. Seasonal whale watching tours also offer sightings of sperm whales, dolphins, and other marine life in the Indian Ocean.

activities.name: Yoga & Meditation Retreats
activities.description: Sri Lanka’s tropical beaches, mountains, and Buddhist heritage make it an ideal place for yoga and meditation retreats. Many wellness centers offer peaceful environments focused on mindfulness, relaxation, and holistic healing.
